headline: Tesla China Financing Push Tests Growth, Margins And Rich Valuation
summary: Tesla has introduced new, more affordable financing offers for its locally made vehicles in China. The move comes after April retail sales in China declined and the company dropped out of the country's top ten EV makers. The offers are targeted at improving affordability and shoring up Tesla's position in the world's largest EV market. Tesla, listed as NasdaqGS:TSLA, is responding to tougher conditions in China with these financing changes at a time when competition and slowing demand are...
